title: Booking Holdings to Attend the Goldman Sachs Communacopia & Technology Conference

title: Booking Holdings tipped for more upside as travel demand persists
text: Booking Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:BKNG) is tipped for more upside after its quarterly earnings impressed, with stockbroker Wedbush raising its target price. “We continue to view Booking as our top pick within online travel and believe the company is best positioned for the current demand environment given its international mix and accommodation mix,” Wedbush analyst Scott Devitt said in a note.

title: Agoda: Thailand, Indonesia and United States properties lead on Customer Service

title: Booking Holdings (BKNG) Tops Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Booking Holdings (BKNG) came out with quarterly earnings of $37.62 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $28.84 per share. This compares to earnings of $19.08 per share a year ago.

title: The Afters: Apple, Amazon, Draftkings, Booking.com, Coinbase, Airbnb, and more
text: Apple Inc (NASDAQ:AAPL) stock was down 3% after Thursday's market close, as traders reacted to a 1% softening in revenue on weaker iPhone sales – despite Tim Cook calling it ‘an improved quarter'. Amazon.com Inc (NASDAQ:AMZN) meanwhile impressed, sending its stock more than 8% higher to US$139.50.

title: Booking Holdings delivers significant 2Q beat on 'robust leisure travel demand'
text: Booking Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:BKNG) shares surged after the travel booking firm's second-quarter results surpassed market expectations aided by a recovering travel industry.  Revenue for the quarter ended June 30 reached $5.5 billion, a substantial 27% jump year-over-year and topping expectations of $5.17 billion.

title: Booking Holdings stock rises on earnings beat, ‘record summer travel season' forecast
text: Booking Holdings Inc. BKNG, -1.56% shares rose in the extended session Thursday after the travel and booking site reported an earnings beat and forecast a record summer travel season. Booking shares rose more than 4% after hours, following a 1.6% decline in the regular session to close at $2,839.91.
